description: Create a content slide with a left-side insight headline and a right-side horizontal stacked bar chart showing marquee summer trip booking status by income group.

header.headline: In a possible signal of concern about high prices, fewer travelers have fully booked their marquee trips, with the drop most prominent among the $100K to $199K income group

labels: Destination decided, but no bookings made
Plan to travel, but no destination decision or bookings made
right.title: Booking status of marquee summer trips

footer.source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey. Note: Question: “Thinking of the longest trip you will take this summer, how would you describe your progress in planning and booking this trip?” (n = 1,808). Source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey.
